host.kernel_cmdline: BOOT_IMAGE=/boot/vmlinuz-6.15.11-061511-generic root=UUID=85355174-a2ad-4e84-bf78-53fac30b89fb ro panic=10 panic_on_oops=1 softlockup_panic=1 hung_task_panic=1 splash quiet iommu=pt vt.handoff=7

benchmarks.name: memcmp_prefix_64
benchmarks.description: Compare three 64-byte candidates against a fixed prefix pattern
benchmarks.hypothesis: Early-exit byte comparisons should expose byte-load lowering and branch short-circuit behavior

benchmarks.name: packet_parse_vlans_tcpopts
benchmarks.description: Packet-backed Ethernet plus VLAN plus IPv4 plus TCP parser with options walk
benchmarks.hypothesis: Variable cursor advancement and repeated bounds checks should magnify packet-parse codegen differences

benchmarks.name: local_call_fanout
benchmarks.description: Dispatch among four __noinline local subprograms with different pressure profiles
benchmarks.hypothesis: Fan-out local calls should stress call-site layout, prologue diversity, and join-point register allocation

benchmarks.name: packet_rss_hash
benchmarks.description: Parse an IPv4 TCP 5-tuple and compute a Jenkins-style flow hash
benchmarks.hypothesis: Endian conversion plus field extraction and rotates should be more workload-realistic than standalone checksum math

benchmarks.name: imm64_storm
benchmarks.description: Straight-line reduction with many distinct 64-bit immediates
benchmarks.hypothesis: Dense literal materialization should surface backend differences hidden by data-driven kernels

benchmarks.name: alu32_64_pingpong
benchmarks.description: Alternate u32 and u64 arithmetic on the same live values
benchmarks.hypothesis: Mixed-width arithmetic should stress zero-extension correctness and 32-bit lowering quality

benchmarks.name: branch_fanout_32
benchmarks.description: Thirty-two-way sparse branch fanout with nontrivial per-arm work
benchmarks.hypothesis: Wide sparse fanout should stress branch layout and compare-ladder lowering beyond dense switch dispatch

benchmarks.name: deep_guard_tree_8
benchmarks.description: Eight-level nested guard tree over staged record fields
benchmarks.hypothesis: Deeply nested conditionals should magnify branch inversion, hot-path asymmetry, and join pressure

benchmarks.name: mega_basic_block_2048
benchmarks.description: Single very large acyclic straight-line block with many live temporaries
benchmarks.hypothesis: A huge basic block should directly stress scheduling and register allocation scalability
